calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Hearing And Ruling On Petition Releasing Property From Mechanics Lien
Off Calendar May-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONERS' MOTION FOR HEARING AND RULING ON PETITION RELEASING PROPERTY FROM MECHANIC'S LIEN is GRANTED. Attorney's fees granted in the amount of $2,905. No opposition filed.

Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
